[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101100 4
1 0010001 2
2 0010111 4
3 0100101 3
4 0110111 5
5 1101000 3
6 1010011 4
7 1100000 2

01 10 1101100 4 match 0
12 21 1111101 6
23 32 0010111 4 match 2
34 43 0110111 5 match 4
45 54 0110111 5 match 4
56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1111011 6
70 07 1110011 5

02 20 1110001 4
13 31 1111111 a
24 42 0110101 4
35 53 0110111 5 match 4
46 64 1101101 5
57 75 1110111 6
60 06 1101000 3 match 5
71 17 1111111 a

03 30 1110111 6
14 41 1101101 5
25 52 0110111 5 match 4
36 63 1111111 a
47 74 1110111 6
50 05 1110111 6
61 16 1101100 4 match 0
72 27 1010011 4 match 6

04 40 1100101 4
15 51 1111111 a
26 62 1111001 5
37 73 1010111 5
